pages.text: <?xml version="1.0"?> <gc:Codelist xmlns:gc="http://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/ns/genericode/1.0/"> <gc:Identification> <gc:ShortName Lang="en">Reasons for credit note</gc:ShortName> <gc:Version>1</gc:Version> </gc:Identification> <gc:ColumnSet> <gc:Column Id="id" Use="required"> <gc:ShortName>Identifier</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="name" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Name</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="description" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Description</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Key Id="idKey"> <gc:ColumnRef Ref="id"/> </gc:Key> </gc:ColumnSet> <gc:SimpleCodeList> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.61.1.A</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>If the supply was cancelled.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.61.1.B</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>If the tax treatment of the supply has changed due to a change in the nature of the supply.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.61.1.C</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>If the previously agreed consideration for the supply was altered for any reason (i.e. bad debt relief).</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.61.1.D</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>If the recipient of goods or recipient of services returned them to the registrant in full or in part and the Consideration was returned in full or in part.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>DL8.61.1.E</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>If the tax was charged or tax treatment was applied in error.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>VD</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Volume Discount.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> </gc:SimpleCodeList> </gc:Codelist>
